Package it.unipi.tonightscall.service

  • Constructor Details

    • UserService

      public UserService(UserRepository userRepository, EventRepository eventRepository, UserGraphRepository userGraphRepository, EventGraphRepository eventGraphRepository, org.springframework.security.crypto.password.PasswordEncoder passwordEncoder, TopicGraphRepository topicGraphRepository)

  • Method Details

    • addFriendship

      public UserDTO addFriendship(String usernameNewFriend, String myID)
      Adds a new friendship between two Users.

      This method:

      1. Checks if the two users (current user and future friend) exist.
      2. Adds the friend to the current user friend list.
      3. Adds the user to the friend's friend list.
      4. Saves the users to MongoDB.
      5. Saves the corresponding nodes in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      usernameNewFriend - The Username of the user who is being befriended.
      myID - The id of the User who is making the friendship.
      Returns:
      The new UserDTO.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If one of the two users is not found.

    • getAllUsers

      public org.springframework.data.domain.Page<@NonNull UserDTO> getAllUsers(org.springframework.data.domain.Pageable pageable)
      Returns all the users
      Parameters:
      pageable - for implementing the pagination
      Returns:
      Page of UserDTO or null

    • getUserById

      public UserDTO getUserById(String id)
      Returns the User from the id
      Parameters:
      id - The id of the user
      Returns:
      The wanted user or null

    • addAttendance

      public EventDTO addAttendance(String eventID, String ticket_type, String id)
      Adds a User new Attendance to an Event.

      This method:

      1. Checks if the User exists.
      2. Checks if the Event exists.
      3. Adds the User's attendance to the Event's list of attendants.
      4. Adds the Event to the list of events the User is going to attend.
      5. Saves the User and Event to MongoDB.
      6. Saves the corresponding nodes in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      eventID - The id of the event the Users wants to attend.
      ticket_type - The ticket type the User selected.
      id - The id of the User.
      Returns:
      The new EventDTO.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the User or the Event are not found (both in MongoDB or Neo4j).

    • addReview

      public EventDTO addReview(String eventID, String text, int score, String id)
      Adds a Review to an Event.

      This method:

      1. Checks if the User exists.
      2. Checks if the Event exists.
      3. Adds the Event to the User's list of ReviewdEvents.
      4. Adds the Review to the Event's list of reviews.
      5. Saves the User and Event to MongoDB.
      6. Saves the corresponding nodes in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      eventID - The id of the reviewed Event.
      text - The text of the Review.
      score - The score of the Review.
      id - The id of the User who left a Review.
      Returns:
      The new EventDTO.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the User or the Event are not found (both in MongoDB or Neo4j).

    • updateUser

      public UserDTO updateUser(String userID, UserDTO newUserDTO)
      Updates a User data.

      This method:

      1. Checks if the specific user exists
      2. Checks for consistency: username and date of birth can't change, whereas friendships and reviewed events can't change directly in this function
      3. Updates the data.
      4. Saves the User to MongoDB.
      5. Updates the corresponding node in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      userID - The ID of the user to update.
      newUserDTO - The UserDTO containing the updated data.
      Returns:
      The updated UserDTO.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the User is not found or if the user tries to update username, date of birth, friendships or reviewed events.

    • updateReview

      public ReviewParameterDTO updateReview(String EventID, ReviewParameterDTO newReviewDTO, String id)
      Updates a Review.

      This method:

      1. Checks if the specific user exists.
      2. Checks if the event exists.
      3. Updates the review for the user.
      4. Updates the review and score for the event.
      5. Saves the User to MongoDB.
      6. Saves the Event to MongoDB.
      7. Updates the corresponding node in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      EventID - The ID of the event the review was written for.
      newReviewDTO - The ReviewDTO containing the updated data.
      id - The id of the user who is making the update of their review.
      Returns:
      The updated ReviewDTO.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the User is not found, if the Event is not found or if the user didn't actually review the event.

    • deleteReview

      public UserDTO deleteReview(String eventID, String id)
      Deletes a Review.

      This method:

      1. Checks if the specific user exists.
      2. Checks if the specific event exists.
      3. Deletes the review from the user.
      4. Deletes the review from the event.
      5. Saves changes to MongoDB
      6. Saves changes in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      eventID - The ID of the event the Review belongs to.
      id - The Username of the user the Review was written by.
      Returns:
      The updated UserDTO
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the User is not found or if the event is not found.

    • deleteAttendance

      public UserDTO deleteAttendance(String eventID, String id)
      Deletes an Attendance to an Event.

      This method:

      1. Checks if the specific user exists
      2. Checks if the specific event exists
      3. Deletes the attendance
      4. Saves the changes to MongoDB.
      5. Saves the changes to the User Node in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      eventID - The ID of the event the user was going to attend.
      id - The id of the user whose attendee must be deleted.
      Returns:
      The updated UserDTO
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If the User is not found or if the event is not found.
      IllegalArgumentException - If the userId doesn't exists or the event doesn't exists

    • deleteFriendship

      public UserDTO deleteFriendship(String id, String friendUsername)
      Deletes a friendship between two users.

      This method:

      1. Checks if the specific user exists
      2. Checks if the specific user's friend exists
      3. Checks if the users are actually friends (user's friend list and friend's friend list)
      4. Saves the changes to MongoDB.
      5. Saves the changes to the User Nodes in the Graph Database (Neo4j).

      Parameters:
      id - The id of the User who wants to unfriend another User.
      friendUsername - the Username of the User that has to be unfriended.
      Returns:
      The updated UserDTO
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - If one of the two Users is not found or if the friendship is not found.

    • makeSuggestion

      public List<EventDTO> makeSuggestion(String userId, int distance, LocalDate startingDate, int limit)
      Processes event suggestions logic. Validates input parameters and maps graph entities to data transfer objects.
      Parameters:
      userId - The unique identifier of the user.
      distance - The search radius in kilometers.
      startingDate - The date from which to start looking for events.
      limit - The maximum number of events to return.
      Returns:
      A list of EventDTO containing event details.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if distance or limit are less than or equal to zero.

    • makeFriendSuggestion

      public List<String> makeFriendSuggestion(String userId, int limit)
      Friend suggestion process: validates input parameters and extracts usernames from the retrieved UserNode entities.
      Parameters:
      userId - The unique identifier of the user seeking suggestions.
      limit - The maximum number of suggestions to process.
      Returns:
      A list of usernames (Strings) representing potential friends.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the limit is less than or equal to zero.
